author: @120chester
text: PWB did NOT pocket $100M. I’ve worked in Hollywood for writers and actors with deals like this and payments are staggered to production - when the project is approved, first day of shooting, last day of shooting, released in theaters, etc. Don’t cry for PWP. She received payment when she signed the deal and more to cover initial development of projects, but $100M is just a number she can use to market herself.

replies.text: @  I just don’t believe she was handed $100 million in cash with no strings attached. And Amazon isn’t looking for full length theater movies they’re looking for streaming TV shows.

author: @kokomo74149
text:
Cut ties and run. She's not A lister quality, she can't act, she boring, unoriginal, has no creativity or drive. I really don't see why anyone would give her job in Hollywood. She should have never been in the industry at all as an actor. 

My question... who's she related to??? There's a couple of ways you get those money laundering deals and nepotism is the one I see for her. And make no mistake THIS IS MONEY LAUNDERING IN OUR FACES. 

The Obamas - 100s of millions... produced very little to earn it. 

Meghan Markle - 100 million... never produced anything but a few cringe podcasts. 

There's others that won't come to mind right now but point is... the studios never get about it. If they aren't getting mad about it... There's something fishy going on. I've seen studios sue for MUCH less. 

So phoebe must have a nepotism angle to this money laundering game somewhere. And before you say the above mentioned don't... one was 1st black president of America, the other married royalty. They are both in the money laundering club. 😂

replies.author: @CultureCasino

replies.author: @ardendragoon8792
replies.text: She is related to somebody. I can't remember the name.

replies.author: @kokomo74149
replies.text:
​@ardendragoon8792She is WELL connected. She's Definitely money laundering material. Smh

- Daughter of Michael Cyprian Waller-Bridge, founder of the electronic trading platform Tradepoint,[5] and Theresa Mary, daughter of Sir John Edward Longueville Clerke, 12th Baronet, employed by the Worshipful Company of Ironmongers.

Her grandfather, Cyprian Waller-Bridge (1918-1960), "a Wodehousian sort of character... 'the eccentric son of an eccentric vicar'",[11] was an actor and BBC announcer.[12][13][14] On her father's side, she is a descendant of the Revd Sir Egerton Leigh, 2nd Baronet, and a distant relative of politician and author Egerton Leigh, Conservative MP for Mid Cheshire from 1873 to his death in 1876.[15][16]

author: @RlmorganInSC
text: I try to be kind and since I have been married for 44 years to a strong woman, I don't think my comments will come from a "patriarchal" view; I just do not see her a s draw for anything except perhaps Hallmark Movies.  I know that for me, as much as I love Tomb Raider, I would NOT go see her in that role or frankly any other.  I try to separate personality from performance but this incessant grandstanding has eroded my appreciation except for a few such as Statham and Keanu and always until the end of time, Sophia Loren.  🙂
